findings.description: シーケンスフロー名 is a first-column property in the シーケンスフロー table but is absent from s11 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source table for シーケンスフロー lists: ワークフローID, バージョン, シーケンスフローID, 接続元フローノードID, 接続先フローノードID, フロー進行条件, シーケンスフロー名. All other searchable column names are in hints except シーケンスフロー名.

findings.description: Knowledge file has 21 sections while source has approximately 29 headings. Several intermediate parent headings lack dedicated sections: 利用の準備 (h2) is merged into s4 along with its two h3 subsections; データ作成対象テーブル (h3) has no section; 精査仕様 (h3) has no section; フロー進行条件、完了条件クラスの省略記法の変更 (h3) has no section; ワークフロー定義ファイル読込元、ワークフロー定義データ出力先の変更 (h3) is merged into s19. All content is preserved through merging so no information is lost, but the structural gap is noted by the automated pre-check.
